editor.rationale: Reviewers support publication but want clarifications on reporting completeness and residual uncertainty.

concerns: Only k=3 of 154 available trials included; heterogeneity and publication-bias diagnostics are underpowered. Justify exclusions or expand eligibility.
RoB 2.0: 0 high-risk + 3 some-concerns domains; add low-RoB sensitivity analysis.
Pooled 0.85 diverges from Stone 2018 benchmark (HR 0.53 [0.40, 0.70]); Discussion should reconcile explicitly.
I² = 78.1% (considerable); show subgroup/strata estimates alongside pooled.
QoL / PROs not reported by any included trial; add a PRO secondary outcome where source-trial data permits.
